chunks.text: IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH CIRCUIT COURT, LARKANA Present: Irshad Ali Shah, J. Agha Faisal, J. CP D827 of 2017: Shahmeer Ali &Others vs. S.S.P Shikarpur &Others For the Petitioners: Mr. Irfan Baddar Abbasi, Advocate For the Respondents: Mr. Abdul Hamid Bhurgri, Addl. A.G. Dates of hearing: 09.02.2022. Date of announcement: 09.02.2022. ORDER Agha Faisal, J. The petitioners seek appointment as police constables upon the premise that they were successful candidates in such regard. The comments filed by the concerned respondent demonstrate that the petitioners No.1 and 2 were declared medically unfit by the concerned authority, whereas, petitioner No.3 failed in the written test as well as in the interview. It is apparent that no vested right has been demonstrated before us to merit invocation of the discretionary writ jurisdiction of this Court and even otherwise this matter is fraught with factual controversy, not amenable for adjudication in writ jurisdiction. In view hereof, this petition is found to be without merit and is hereby dismissed. JUDGE JUDGE Per Ijaz Ul Ahsan J. in Syed Iqbal Hussain Shah Gillani vs. PBC & Others reported as 2021 SCMR 425; Muhammad Fiaz Khan vs. Ajmer Khan & Another reported as 2010 SCMR 105. 2016 CLC 1; 2015 PLC 45; 2015 CLD 257; 2011 SCMR 1990; 2001 SCMR 574; PLD 2001 Supreme Court 415.
